author: gastown/crew/holden
text: Root Cause: priming check creates SHORT, role-agnostic identity anchor at ~/gt/CLAUDE.md. claude-settings check assumes ANY ~/gt/CLAUDE.md is Mayor-specific. Both are valid but not coordinating. Fix options: (A) allow short identity anchor in claude-settings, (B) remove town-root requirement from priming, or (C) fix template to generate short bootstrap.

author: gastown/crew/holden
text: claude-settings check was added in PR #239 (commit f6f6acdb) - 'Consolidate Claude settings management'
